name: Almond Streusel Bundt Cake & Coffee Glaze
recipeIngredient: Instant coffee powder (or espresso powder): 1 ½ teaspoons
Butter (chilled, cut into pieces): ¼ cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Streusel: In a small bowl, mix brown sugar, almonds, cinnamon, oats, and instant coffee powder. Add butter pieces and rub mixture between fingertips until well combined.
2. Prepare the Bundt pan by greasing and flouring it. Mix cake flour and baking powder in another bowl. Finely grind toasted almonds separately.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and almond paste until smooth. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating until light and fluffy. Stir in almond extract.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients mixture and milk to the butter-sugar mixture, mixing gently until just combined. Fold in ground almonds.
5. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until medium peaks form. Gradually add remaining sugar, beating until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold one-third of the meringue into the batter, then add the rest in two portions, stirring to combine.
7. Pour half of the batter into the prepared Bundt pan and sprinkle with streusel. Spoon remaining batter over the streusel.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until a toothpick inserted comes out clean, about 1 hour. Let cool completely in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes before turning out onto a rack to finish cooling.
9. For the glaze, whisk powdered sugar, whipping cream, and instant coffee powder until smooth.
10. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake, allowing it to run down the sides. Sprinkle with toasted sliced almonds.
End of Recipe
